title: Assist with protected cropping water sampling and testing
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assist with protected cropping water sampling and testing demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Collect water sample

pcs.text: Confirm with supervisor crop water to be sampled
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm with supervisor crop water to be sampled?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with supervisor crop water to be sampled.

pcs.text: Identify and select water sample tools and materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select water sample tools and materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select water sample tools and materials.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with sampling and testing crop water and minimise impact

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with sampling and testing crop water and minimise impact.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise workplace hazards and report safety concerns.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task and workplace safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task and workplace safety requirements.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take samples as instructed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take samples as instructed.

pcs.text: Assist with labelling and recording samples as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with labelling and recording samples as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with labelling and recording samples as required.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Relate water test results to suitability of water for growing crops.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record water test results according to workplace procedures.
